vulnerabilities.title: Cross-Site Scripting in @progress/kendo-angular-editor
vulnerabilities.description: Kendo UI for Angular Editor Component (npm package @progress/kendo-angular-editor) before version 1.2.3 is vulnerable to Cross-Site Scripting. When the Editor content contains potentially malicious scripts in element event handlers, they get executed. Adding the following content to the Editor value demonstrates the issue: ``.
